title: Krish's Goofy Mod
description: A minecraft mod that is pretty goofy!
body:
DUE TO TECHNICAL ISSUES, THIS MOD HAS BEEN CANCELLED. RELEASE 2.2 ONLY INCLUDES BUG FIXES. NO NEW RELEASES WILL BE DROPPED.

This is a goofy mod i made in Mcreator, which is inspired by a random bedrock mod i also made
Explore a bunch of goofy shenanigans in this mod! this mod adds goofy axes, mobs, swords, Fluids, KEYBINDS, and so much more as development grows!

Mod Dependencies: Nothing
Optional dependencies: Pehkui for sizing, and Walkers for morphing into the mobs in this mod

MOD BY KRISHD_YT

# FEATURES

- Very Goofy Armor
- A goofy toolset, consisting of Zeus!?!
- Goofy mobs
- Goofy keybinds even
- Goofy Blocks

Enjoy!!!
